---
title: "Feature Idea"
category: "Ideas"
---

### 💡 Description of the Feature Idea
*What is the proposed feature or improvement? Please describe it in detail.*

### 🛠️ Problem Statement
*What problem does this feature solve? Describe the user pain points or architectural limitations.*

### 📐 Proposed Architectural Design
*Explain how this feature would fit into the existing MVVM structure (ViewModels, Repository, Room Database, etc.). Feel free to include code snippets, database schema drafts, or diagrams.*

### 🚀 Value to End Users
*How does this enhancement improve the security, performance, or usability of Privacy Lock?*
